occupation: Advisory Board Chair at ABODE Media
headline: Advisor to founders | Deep Board experience | Mentoring growth company executives | Sales & Business development underpinned  by great people & culture | Start-ups | Acquisitions | Tech Transformation
summary:
Brendon brings a deep view of business strategy, including customer growth and long-term development, combined with business positioning, to fast-growing markets, acquisitions, and other financial events from PE to IPO.

He thrives on being involved in growing new businesses and finding solutions to the challenges and opportunities that arise through creating the multiple strategies and business reinventions required over the life of a business.

Founder of oOh!media, Brendon pioneered the industry’s move to digital, placing him firmly at the forefront of Out of Home advertising in Australia and New Zealand. Under Brendon’s leadership, the business delivered strong growth through strategic acquisitions, organic growth, and the development and introduction of several new environments to capitalise on the growth in digital and people’s increasing habits away from home.

Brendon’s career in developing oOh! has involved two ASX listings, private equity majority ownership, nearly forty acquisitions, three capital raisings, and developing from a two-person start-up to over 800 employees in ANZ, which has resulted in being the market leader it is today. oOh! is a diverse business, requiring media, property, logistics, maintenance, advanced data and tech enterprise skills.

Brendon has been an ASX director for over 16 years, International Vice President of the global industry body The World Out of Home Organization, and founding director and shareholder of I learning P/L, one of the first digital online publishing and training business in Australia.

experiences.title: Advisory Board Chair
experiences.description:
• Chaired the Advisory Board at Abode-Media, focusing on enhancing digital media strategies.  
• Collaborated with stakeholders to optimize residential building media digital signs across the UK market.  
• Drove initiatives to connect residents with targeted advertising, improving audience engagement.

experiences.title: Advisory Board Member
experiences.description: Lumos understands and engages real world audiences on the world’s first unified customer intelligence platform.

experiences.title: Advisory Board Chair
experiences.description:
• Chaired the Advisory Board at Doohly, guiding strategic direction for AI-driven operating platforms.  
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance connectivity solutions for digital signage in various sectors.  
• Advocated for innovative approaches in OOH Media, Retail Media, Health and Safety, Education, and Health and Fitness.

experiences.title: Founder | Advisor | Mentor | Board Member | Consultant
experiences.description:
• Founded Outdoor Network Australia, an advisory company focused on supporting businesses with Board advisory and Chair roles.  
• Collaborated closely with founders and management teams to drive business growth and explore new market opportunities.  
• Provided mentorship and strategic guidance to startups, enhancing their operational effectiveness and market positioning.

experiences.title: Investor and Advisor to co founders
CEO and Managing Director
experiences.description:
Brendon Cook founded Outdoor Network Australia, now known as oOh! Media, in 1989. 

Brendon has had 31 years experience in outdoor media with companies including Australian Posters, Britescreens and Alan Davis.
 
Brendon is also a board member of the OMA (Outdoor Media Association of Australia) and has, for more than 14 years, been an active member of the Executive Connection Group, an international organisation dedicated to increasing the effectiveness of CEOs.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Hall of Fame Outdoor Media Association Australia OMA
The Lifetime Achievement Award
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: This is awarded to someone who has devoted his or her lifetime career to the Out of Home medium and is widely respected and recognised by his or her peers.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Order of Australia  General Division
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: OAM for Services to Advertising and Social enterprises

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Sir Charles McGrath Award
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: Since 1976, the Sir Charles McGrath Award has been presented to those who have made the most significant contribution to the field of marketing through sound business practice, development of the marketing profession, or wider industry achievements.
